BackstoryDef.title: Blacksite escapee
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was in the wrong place at the wrong time. Kidnapped and convicted of a crime [PAWN_pronoun] didn't commit, [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to a prison planet. While incarcerated, [PAWN_pronoun] saw people being tortured almost daily, and had to do be resourceful to avoid being tortured themselves. [PAWN_nameDef] managed to escape one day after a pirate raid gave them enough time to reach the emergency escape shuttles.
